title: Rawnsley Park Station
description: Rural resort offering modest cabins & plush villas, plus dining, a pool & outdoor pursuits.
address: Flinders Ranges Way, Hawker SA 5434, Australia
hotelDescription:
This remote resort on a rural sheep station is 12 km from Flinders Ranges National Park and 37 km from the town of Hawker.
 Lodging options range from laid-back 1- to 3-bedroom cabins, to plush 1- and 2-bedroom villas. All offer TVs and Wi-Fi (fee), in addition to kitchens, living areas and verandahs. Villas feature original artwork and free breakfast packs; an upgraded villa adds a private pool.
 There's a warm restaurant with a fireplace and a terrace, as well as an outdoor pool, a BBQ area and hiking trails. Activities include mountain biking, farm experiences, scenic local flights and 4-wheel drive tours (fees apply). Camping is also offered.

title: Discovery Resorts - Wilpena Pound
description: Low-key safari resort with modern rooms and tents, plus a restaurant, a bar and park tours (fees).
address: Wilpena Rd, Via Hawker SA 5434, Australia
hotelDescription:
In the wildlife-rich Flinders Ranges National Park, this relaxed safari resort with lodge rooms and modern tents is 16.5 km from Arkaroo Rock cave and 55 km from the nearest town, Hawker.
 The simple rooms include tea and coffeemaking facilities, minifridges and flat-screen TVs. Upgraded rooms add kitchenettes. Upscale tents feature bathrooms and air-conditioning.
 The seasonal restaurant serves breakfast and dinner, and there's a year-round bistro/bar. Other amenities include an outdoor pool, a convenience store and a coin laundry, plus a caravan campsite. Car, bike and plane tours are available (fees).
